endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets all role assignments for the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets role assignments for a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets role assignments for a resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /{roleId}
endpoints.description: Gets a role assignment by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEID}} with a real roleid.

endpoints.name: PUT /{roleId}
endpoints.description: Creates a role assignment by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEID}} with a real roleid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{roleId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEID}} with a real roleid.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
endpoints.description: Gets role assignments for a scope.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/{roleAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real roleassignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/{roleAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real roleassignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/{roleAssignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real roleassignmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
